segments.text: śarīraṁ surūpam sadārōg muktaṁ
yashācāru citram dhanam meru tulyaṁ
manas jai lagham gururoram kripaṭke
tatat kim, tatat kim, tatat kim, tatat kim
Jai Mata Ji, Jai Mata Ji, Jai Mata Ji
TURU RORAM KRIPAT KE TATAKKIN TATAKKIN TATAKKIN TATAKKIN
MATAJI JEE MATAJI JEE MATAJI
SADACHAR VRUTTESHU MATO NACCHANYA
Today we are going to have Guru Puja.
I am supposed be your guru, but i feel sometimes that the idea of a guru is very different
from mine.
Normally a guru is very, very strict person and has no patience of any kind.
Even say music there are gurus who teach in India so all the disciplines have to be
absolutely followed I know about this great musician Ravishankar we had been here where
He came and my father was very much respected by his guru, Galaudinkhasa.
So he asked him why don't you play something?
We didn' t tell anything that time then we showed a big bump here
is it said do see this what
My own Tanpura broke on head because I was little bit out of tune
Otherwise, he was a very nice man I must say.
But when it came to teaching
tradition i think that you have
put all kinds of disciplines on the students
but still they stick onto the Guru
They look after them all time and are bothered
If the guru wants this thing then run
if he want's these things will do
And guru goes on taking different types of tests,
off the disciple.
Like Shivaji's Guru asked him that
I would like to drink
The milk
Of a Tigress
So he said all right
If my Guru has said it is his look out
so went into forest
and He saw a tigress sitting there
she had already finished
giving milk in her cups
So she bowed, he bowed before the tigress and said see my guru wants your milk.
Will you please give some milk for My Guru?
And then TIGRESS understood it
She stood up
He took out The Milk of the Tigress For The Guru
so in this one can see that in the obedience
Of THE GURU
One achieves even the impossible things
Another time his guru said that he has got a big boil on His neck and
That it is all ripe,
And anybody who will suck It.
She was to be my disciple
My Disciple when He sucks It I'll Be alright
Everybody Was so
Averse To a thing like that
Shivaji Maharaj Said of course i Will Suck It
Bend Down
and he started sucking it from the bandage that was there,
And It Was a mango.
So
There are two-three types of tests
Are all time taken
Of The Disciple
Firstly
How much
They obey you
But as You All have got Realization
& You're Your own Gurus
I don't put That condition on You
I leave it to your freedom.
i tell you earnestly in all the way possible
what think good for
but,I don't compel
like these gurus used too do
they use to beat
hang them on a well
They were so very strict
with their disciples and have had an experience of this
never used smile
no question laughing
and would never show any kind of weakness,
or kindness for the disciples.
This is about spiritual gurus I am telling you
but those who wanted their ascent
Wanted there realization
Would go on passing through all kinds of tortures
that they put in them
Some of the gurus didn't like some disciples
They would tell them, all right you now stand on your one leg all the time.
So they are standing with their legs like a crane
Another thing is that when they say to stand on head
The way in which they used treat their disciples was rather difficult for Me
I can't do it
All of this time compassion becomes tears in My eyes
It's find it impossible.
I may just say in a way, sometimes also
said that looks like little scolding
but to be mother and to be guru is the most difficult thing
.I do not know what comes first
But of course every mother wants
her child
to be good, and the Holy Mother wants Her child
To Be a holy person.
The first thing is the holiness
Now for that how can you compel someone?
Only think
That makes You understand
Is this
If we don't become holy
How will get your ascent
We have got to be holy
What discipline one could put
for making a person holy.
What can you force?
what Can You get angry For?
Only method I use normally is to forgive
Maybe the forgiveness
Is The highest quality,
i think
for teaching people
When they know that
They have done wrong
and they confess it
then you Have To Forgive
Like in life of Buddha
There was A man
Who Was
abusing him without understanding.
And when he finished with his abusers
and Buddha had left,
people told Him do you know whom You were abusing?
It was Lord Buddha got a fright of His life
He said where is he gone?
He's gone to the another village
so went on other villages
then He says Sir I am sorry but
i said please forgive me it all wrong
an should not have done
you can punish Me in way like
Lord Buddha said, when did you do that?
He says yesterday.
I don't know about the day before and only today
See even if we tell these things how great one feels
So your greatness or nobility
will definitely infuse people
It's not by fighting
by quarreling
By saying harsh thing
it is going to work out
Also
The gurus used to control the children very much,
disciples – absolutely controlled.
You have get up at four o'clock
sit down for meditation and if you had not got up they would beat
I can't understand
Sahaja Yoga is different from all other
gurus that
we believe in power of love
Power Of Love teaches how be forgiving
It makes you noble, it makes very balanced.
So the gurus who were there for Bhavasagara to establish dharma in
human beings first thing they had to balance themselves against all
practical things as we call them – nothing is not practical but
But they said, no. For us this is higher, nobler and important
so that would balance people because
They had the power of love within themselves
All these Adi Gurus and their incarnations if you see them
always have balanced
And always praised
The Love Of God
When we talk about realization
Then one has to know first of all that we have to have patience with ourselves.
I know some people don't feel so good,
Some People still have sicknesses
,some people dont even feel vibrations sometimes
Have Patience With Yourself
When you become your own Guru
First thing as the Guru Has Patience
His or Her Disciple
You must have patience with yourself
In that patience you will learn
That You can tolerate so many things without any trouble.
Let's say one person who goes on grudging,
oh this is not good ,that it' snot good
because they have no patients with themselves
If we are patient
With yourself everything you'll accept
Wherever your are
Your're with yourselves
Because you realize souls
So you won't frustrate,
You will not get angry and also
you'll no go on grumbling or grudging
because your enjoying yourself.
Even if there's a mattress
alright? If ther isn' t
you can sleep in the grass
with no grass you can sleep on the stove
And also you need to not sleep like last night
Makes no difference what so ever
The first thing I find
with people they have no patience. Firstly maybe because their conditioned, say if you
ever left Vishuddhi by any chance your been a catholic or TM then all the time you start
pitting yourself thinking of your miseries and troubles always try to condemn yourselves
You are a realized soul, and you have no business to condemn yourself.
No Business!
Like the person who is getting drowned has been saved – he's come on show now
nicely got his second life…and there still trying to express his agony as if
is getting drowned.
So you have to awaken yourself, no-no!
No more I am there – I'm finished it's gone now and different."
That was somebody else?
Am not the same person?"
This how…
You had tell yourselves very clearly that,"I am going to condemn myself".
It was your right get Self-realization —you got it—and then
You cannot enjoy it because you have these conditionings,
especially in the West to be miserable
is very fashionable.
There are miseries of people who know no miseries
So for such
People
Who
Have imaginary miseries
Of The Past
Which do not exist In Reality
They Cannot
have the joy of reality. They cannot do it! So for a Sahaja Yogi, is important that he
should enjoy within his heart – its like an ocean which there all time to give you
such thrills, even little drops of this ocean when they trickle down in your being.
It is so soothing experience can be only experienced but it's all waiting within
yourself and such a person also makes others joyous he cannot see another person unhappy
in trouble, himself is full of joy and spreads joy all around.
You can get Joy from small-small things
because you have the ocean
And a little thing that drops into
The Ocean creates such beautiful ripples
They touch the shores
Not only off your own being but also others
Very very Small Things make you so very happy
And that all the time you are just like a surfing, as they call it these days on this
beautiful lake or a beautiful ocean of love.
Love is joy-giving – It's not carnal love but Divine love!
So we as Sahaja Yogis and as Gurus have to love ourselves
and understand our own value.
I think Sahaja Yogis have not yet understood their values
How many people in this world can give Realization?
how may know about Kundalini
?How Many have seen
People being resurrected all the time
You are made so powerful
that even looking at people you can give Realization
In ordinary love, in carnal love people have fear.
They are afraid that their beloved might depart
or may get sick and it happen this
And they will be all the time under fear
resist enjoying
But for you ,you're with yourself
And you are always protected.
If your attention is bad for a second even,
immediately know that
You're going wrong
–you protect yourself from Yourself!
As soon as
get some physical problem
,You can feel it
.You now how to cure yourself
But again one has
To have balance
If you are off the balance, then you don't even feel vibrations.
You do not know what is wrong with your body.
With direction of movement
whether you're getting destroyed
and this balance has to be established
by all the Sahaja Yogis
These imbalances come towards us
because we still think about our past
or maybe about our future, we worry
these things. What is there to worry when
all the angels and all the ganas are working for you?
You just have order that's it!
Much like sometimes a person
he has made king
And put on throne
before then was beggar
so anybody who comes to bow before him
He says alright give me one pound
You have to know that you are all realized souls and
then,you've got all the powers within your.
Only thing which is very important
Is balance
In Sahaja Yoga also people get into imbalances
How? Like I seen
People who say they're afraid of these worldly laws
They don't know there is such a powerful energy all around you.
Nothing can stop it, nothing can arrest You and find faults but when
When you start doubting, like yesterday's doubting – when you say but.
,when You Start thinking about the man-made laws then God's Laws fail otherwise nobody
can punish You or arrest You nor do anything to You and are absolutely protected
So the main difference between
The old style of guru and modern style of guru is this
that
Old gurus used to say you must suffer. All right,
You have be arrested it's very good
If they give poison take the poison
if They want to slap you take slaps
WhateverThey Want To Do
You should accept
Because It Is your suffering
Not inside
Because your mother is sitting here, how dare anybody touch you?
No one can harm. You have to believe Me when I say that
no-one could harm but
must be have faith within yourself
Nobody had Adi Shakti as the Guru
Adishaktis are those who has all powers of world
So Who Can Harm You
Who Can Torture You
Who can trouble you except for yourself, if want to torture your self?
Nobody could help.
So the greatest difference between
this disciple of other gurus and yourselves is
You don't have suffer
Your not to suffer
And even see
If there's somebody who has some negativity in that person

and work otherwise

We are forgiven

This Hand doesn't complain

To The Collective
they move in a group as described by Gyaneshwara
That you move now
Like the enlightened forest
which gives whatever people like want to have Kalpataru's.
And he says, you move like oceans and talk about God
It is not one single man standing
saying something we saw yesterday in drama
how a singealman had suffered
But You are In A Group
All of them move together with One understanding
Such a powerful group it Is

is first judgment for a person
Those who cannot be collective are not its Sahaja Yogis

or something so that they have a right to scold others,
get angry with other's, shout at them
tell the work do all kinds of things.

You are a Sahaja Yogi when you're absolutely collective
otherwise your'e no Sahajyogi
When we aren't collective
it was simple
That ego, the conditionings of Ego or conditioning's
past may keep you away from others and there is no connection

have now relationship to The Divine
You've understood what is collectivities

a little particle of clay
thinks it as mountain

who says no I can't be collective
i stay on shore
alright the sunshine will evaporate

if we feel then know that
